heading: Wednesday Night
text: Rising chance of rain south, or a wintry mix in the southern Greens.
temperature: Mid 20s to lower 30s, some mid 30s far south

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of rain or a mix south, a rising chance north.

heading: Friday
text: Chance of showers, maybe some early mix east of the Greens.

heading: Saturday
temperature: Upper 40s to mid 50s north, upper 50s to mid 60s south
